name: Bancfirst
description_short: BancFirst is an Oklahoma-based bank offering personal and business checking/savings accounts, loans, credit cards, and wealth management services across multiple locations.
description_long:
BancFirst is a regional bank headquartered in Oklahoma with a physical branch network across the state. The bank has expanded recently, welcoming ABOK customers in communities including Collinsville, Skiatook, Ramona, and Disney. As a traditional full-service bank, BancFirst operates under FDIC deposit insurance protections and maintains established banking infrastructure including call centers and online/mobile platforms.

The bank offers comprehensive personal banking products including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit, individual retirement accounts, personal debit cards with rewards programs, and personal loans. On the lending side, BancFirst provides home equity loans and lines of credit, home mortgage loans, command cash lines of credit, and credit cards. For business customers, they offer business checking accounts, business debit cards, SBA loans, commercial loans, corporate credit cards, and treasury management services. Additionally, BancFirst provides trust and investments services, wealth management, fiduciary services, and retirement services.

BancFirst differentiates itself through its Loyalty Checking account with rewards benefits for $5 monthly maintenance, debit card rewards program, and a focus on regional presence with established community relationships. The bank offers multiple call center phone lines serving Oklahoma and nationwide customers, with extended hours (7 a.m.–10 p.m. M-F, 8 a.m.–10 p.m. Sat, Noon–10 p.m. Sun). They provide financial education resources, online security information, FDIC deposit insurance estimators, and business online banking with positive pay and remote deposit capture capabilities.

As a traditional regional bank, BancFirst serves customers seeking established banking relationships with branch access and comprehensive financial services. However, as a brick-and-mortar institution, they may offer fewer digital-first features or competitive rates compared to online-only banks. The website emphasizes trust and established banking practices rather than aggressive rate competition or niche loan products.
services: Certificates of deposit and individual retirement accounts
Personal debit cards with rewards program
Personal loans and home equity loans/lines of credit
Home mortgage loans and command cash lines of credit
Business checking accounts and SBA loans
Commercial loans and treasury management services
Trust, wealth management, and fiduciary services
Online and mobile banking with bill pay
pros: Loyalty Checking account with rewards benefits at just $5 monthly maintenance
Debit card rewards program for everyday spending
Comprehensive lending options including SBA loans, mortgages, home equity lines, and personal loans
Trust and wealth management services including fiduciary and corporate trust services
Extended call center hours (7 a.m.–10 p.m. M-F, 8 a.m.–10 p.m. Sat, Noon–10 p.m. Sun)
Multiple phone lines and 24/7 debit card fraud reporting (1-855-889-9216)
cons: Limited to Oklahoma service area with regional branch network; no nationwide branches
As traditional bank, likely higher minimum balances or monthly fees compared to online banks
Website does not display competitive rates for checking, savings, CDs, or loan products
No mention of mobile-first or fintech features; appears to be traditional banking platform
Excludes marijuana-related businesses, nonprofits, and religious organizations from SBA lending

contact.address: 100 N Broadway Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73102

best_for: Oklahoma residents seeking full-service banking with local branch access
Small business owners needing SBA loans and commercial lending relationships
Customers wanting rewards-based checking accounts with modest monthly fees
High-net-worth individuals or businesses requiring trust, wealth management, and fiduciary services
diagnosis: BancFirst is best for Oklahoma-based consumers and businesses seeking comprehensive banking services with established local branch relationships and FDIC protection. The main caveat is that as a regional bank, they lack nationwide presence and the website provides no competitive rate information, making it essential for prospective customers to compare rates against national banks and online alternatives before opening accounts or applying for loans.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 100 N Broadway Ave, Oklahoma City, OK 73102
